title: Local Plan examinations: letter to the Chief Executive of the Planning Inspectorate (November 2025)
body: "The Minister of State for Housing and Planning, Matthew Pennycook MP, has written to the Planning Inspectorate to set out that government intends to revoke the Duty to Co-operate for the current plan-making system. He has also made clear that local planning authorities  should continue to collaborate across their boundaries, including on unmet development needs from neighbouring areas. "
